name: saytype
description: Voice input method software built with Tauri

scripts.build: npm run version:tauri:patch && CI=true tauri build && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js
scripts.build:mac: npm run version:tauri:patch && CI=true tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:mac:install: npm run version:tauri:patch && CI=true tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-artifacts.js aarch64-apple-darwin --install
scripts.build:win: npm run version:tauri:patch && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:linux: npm run version:tauri:patch && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

author: Tao
